task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS server interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser window open to https://localhost:7001 showing the Nx Witness VMS web admin interface or API documentation.
The directory path '/opt/nx_storage/primary' is visible in a storage path input field or within the list of storage locations.

task_completion.description: Configure the primary storage as MAIN with a 50 GB limit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The primary storage entry is toggled/enabled, designated as 'MAIN' or 'Standard', and has a reserved space limit set to 50 GB (or 53687091200 bytes).
The directory path '/opt/nx_storage/backup' is visible in a storage path input field or within the list of storage locations.

task_completion.description: Configure the backup storage as BACKUP with a 20 GB limit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The backup storage entry is toggled/enabled, designated as 'BACKUP' or 'Archive', and has a reserved space limit set to 20 GB (or 21474836480 bytes).

task_completion.description: Save and apply the storage configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A final configuration screen, active storage list, or success notification showing both storage locations are successfully added, enabled, and saved with their respective settings.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with the Nx Witness web interface or API client at localhost:7001, rather than typing answers into a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not create fake interfaces to bypass the task
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent writing custom HTML/scripts to mock the Nx Witness interface or success messages.

integrity.description: Agent applied the settings rather than just inspecting the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually clicks 'Save', 'Apply', or submits the API request to persist the configuration, rather than just filling out a form and abandoning it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring two storage locations on the Nx Witness VMS server at https://localhost:7001. Primary storage: path is '/opt/nx_storage/primary', type is MAIN (Standard), and reserved space limit is 50 GB (53687091200 bytes). Backup storage: path is '/opt/nx_storage/backup', type is BACKUP (Archive), and reserved space limit is 20 GB (21474836480 bytes). A 5% tolerance is acceptable for the space limit values if displayed differently in the UI.
